is to rank the RCCs to identify the root cause of the failure. If two                   related metrics in Service 2 are affected by fault propagation, lead-

rics, and codes levels. We modified TrinityRCL by creating virtual                                            graph, the complex relationships between RCCs make it challeng-

      The threat to the internal validity of this paper is the implementa-
